scripts.build: pnpm run build:toolchain && pnpm run build:packages
scripts.build:native-consumers: bash -c 'export PATH="$HOME/go-sdk/go/bin:$PATH"; cd packages/transform/native && go build -o ../../../packages/typia/bin/ttsc-typia-native ./cmd/ttsc-typia'
scripts.build:toolchain: pnpm --filter @typia/ttsc build && pnpm --filter @typia/ttsc go:build && pnpm --filter @typia/ttsx build
scripts.format: prettier --write packages/**/*.ts && prettier --write internals/**/*.ts && prettier --write tests/**/*.ts && prettier --write toolchain-tests/**/*.ts
scripts.pretest: pnpm run guard:generated && pnpm run build:toolchain && pnpm run build:native-consumers
scripts.test: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:toolchain
scripts.test:ci: pnpm run guard:generated && pnpm run build && pnpm run build:native-consumers && pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:toolchain
scripts.package:latest: bash -c 'pnpm --filter=./toolchain/* -r publish --tag latest --access public "$@" && pnpm --filter=./packages/* -r publish --tag latest --access public "$@"' --
